source: ALR-v1 lifecycle classifications applied with A.1 evidence density scoring

confidence_tiers.HIGH: Direct textual anchor in at least 2 independent documents; no contradicting evidence
confidence_tiers.MEDIUM: Single document anchor or multiple indirect references; no direct contradiction
confidence_tiers.LOW: Only inferred from negative assertions or context; no direct definition anchor
confidence_tiers.NONE: No evidence; artifact is absent or not found

scoring_dimensions: anchor_count: number of independent document anchors
cross_layer_reference: whether the artifact is referenced across multiple layers
internal_consistency: no conflicting claims about the artifact
admission_status: whether artifact is CKR-admitted or governance-certified
